form.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 23.74. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 23.74. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a neck second (24.40) over 425m at this track. In form and can return to the winners' list.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a neck second (24.40) over 425m at this track. In form and can return to the winners' list.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 1.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Ballarat three back. Could pose a serious challenge if finds best this time.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 1.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Ballarat three back. Could pose a serious challenge if finds best this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and contacted approaching first turn.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (24.07) over 425m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.comment: Finished third last start (24.07) over 425m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Quickly away at Warrnambool two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 425m. Should be around the mark.

formComments.comment: Quickly away at Warrnambool two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 425m. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Last start winner (24.40) at this track in a Restricted WIN H and will jump from box 6 for the first time. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (24.44) over 425m at this track. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 425m at this track beaten 6 lengths (24.19) behind Chevron Stroll in a Restricted WIN H on March 27. Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (23.17) over 400m at Geelong. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Did a good job on debut at Horsham to win by 4 lengths in 23.11, beating Happy Dad. Last start finished 5th over 425m at this track beaten 1.75 lengths (24.52) behind Sweet Millie in a Restricted WIN H on March 27. Other runners look much more appealing.
